title: Citrusy Crunchy Australian French Lentils Stir-fry
description: A lazy Sunday dish featuring citrusy, crunchy Australian French lentils in a whole30-friendly toast-like texture.
instructions: Rinse and sort the French Lentils, then soak them in cold water for at least an hour. Drain and rinse again.
Toast the slices of bread until golden brown, about 5 minutes per side. Remove from heat and set aside.
In a large skillet or wok, heat 1 tablespoon of avocado oil over medium-high heat. Add the soaked French Lentils and toast them for about 4-5 minutes until they are lightly crispy on all sides.

Drain any excess water from the lentils and add back into the pan. Sauté with a pinch of salt and black pepper. Mix in lemon zest, freshly chopped dill, and pomegranate seeds. Stir well to combine ingredients evenly.
Serve hot with the toasted bread on top as a garnish for added crunch and texture.
